window_summary: This window tracks the recent microsoft/TypeScript release stream from version 5.4 RC through 6.0.3, covering beta, RC, and stable releases with their associated fixed-issue queries and download links.

chunks.title: TypeScript 5.4 RC
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: microsoft/TypeScript
Release: TypeScript 5.4 RC
Tag: v5.4-rc; draft: False; prerelease: True; published_at: 2024-02-22T18:39:31Z; created_at: 2024-02-19T06:10:40Z
Release notes:
For release notes, check out the [release announcement](https://devblogs.microsoft.com/typescript/announcing-typescript-5-4-rc/).
For the complete list of fixed issues, check out the
* [fixed issues query for Typescript 5.4.0 (Beta)](https://github.com/Microsoft/TypeScript/issues?utf8=%E2%9C%93&q=milestone%3A%22TypeScript+5.4.0%22+is%3Aclosed+).
* [fixed issues query for Typescript 5.4.1 (RC)](https://github.com/Microsoft/TypeScript/issues?utf8=%E2%9C%93&q=milestone%3A%22TypeScript+5.4.1%22+is%3Aclosed+).
Downloads are available on:
* [NuGet package](https://www.nuget.org/packages/Microsoft.TypeScript.MSBuild)
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the microsoft/TypeScript release TypeScript 5.4 RC (tag v5.4-rc), the release note provides links to the release announcement and fixed issues queries for TypeScript 5.4.0 (Beta) and 5.4.1 (RC), and notes that downloads are available on NuGet.

questions.query_text: In the microsoft/TypeScript releases, which release note includes a fixed issues query for TypeScript 5.5.4 (Stable) and mentions that NuGet downloads are available soon?

answer_support.answer_text: fixed issues queries for TypeScript 5.5.4 (Stable) ... NuGet (soon)

questions.query_text: Across the microsoft/TypeScript releases, how does the release note for TypeScript 5.9.3 differ from the release note for TypeScript 5.9 (tag v5.9.2) in terms of the fixed issues queries listed?

options.text: 5.9.3 includes a query for 5.9.3 (Stable) while 5.9.2 does not include a query for 5.9.2 (Stable).
5.9.3 omits the query for 5.9.0 (Beta) while 5.9.2 includes it.
Both release notes list exactly the same set of fixed issues queries.
5.9.3 includes a query for 5.9.2 (Stable) while 5.9.2 does not include any stable query.

questions.expected_answer: 5.9.3 includes a query for 5.9.3 (Stable) while 5.9.2 does not include a query for 5.9.2 (Stable).

answer_support.answer_text: fixed issues queries for TypeScript 5.9.0 (Beta), 5.9.1 (RC), and 5.9.3 (Stable)
fixed issues queries for TypeScript 5.9.0 (Beta) and 5.9.1 (RC); notes no specific changes for 5.9.2 (Stable)

questions.query_text: In the microsoft/TypeScript release window, order the following release-content states from earliest to latest: (1) a release note that includes a fixed issues query for TypeScript 5.4.5 (Stable), (2) a release note that includes a fixed issues query for TypeScript 5.5.0 (Beta) and mentions downloads on npm and NuGet, (3) a release note that includes a fixed issues query for TypeScript 5.6.3 (Stable) and mentions downloads on npm and NuGet, (4) a release note that includes a fixed issues query for TypeScript 5.7.0 (Beta) and mentions downloads on npm.

answer_support.answer_text: fixed issues query for TypeScript 5.5.0 (Beta) ... downloads are available on npm and NuGet
fixed issues queries for TypeScript 5.6.3 (Stable) ... downloads are available on npm and NuGet
fixed issues query for TypeScript 5.7.0 (Beta) ... downloads are available on npm
